sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39246" key="e)pidiista/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδιιστάω</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <sense id="n39246.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dilate</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ στόμα τῆς ὑστέρας</foreign> Aspasiaap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
